info.name: Board Third Party Library API (Contract Tests)

exec: pm.test("Four platform roles are returned", function () { pm.expect(json.roles.length).to.eql(4); });
pm.test("Config exposes issuer and callback URL", function () { pm.expect(json.issuer).to.be.a("string"); pm.expect(json.callbackUrl).to.be.a("string"); });

var hasRealCallbackInputs = Boolean(authCode && authState && authCode.indexOf("{{") !== 0 && authState.indexOf("{{") !== 0 && authCode.indexOf("replace-with-") !== 0 && authState.indexOf("replace-with-") !== 0);
pm.test("Callback success flow skipped without real auth callback inputs", function () { pm.expect(true).to.eql(true); });
pm.test("Callback returns token and user", function () { pm.expect(json.accessToken).to.be.a("string"); pm.expect(json.user.displayName).to.eql("Local Admin"); });
